action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed 5 epochs with CLIP ViT-L/14. Best worst-region accuracy on val = 0.5753 (Africa is always the worst region). Model is still improving steadily. Training takes ~6 min/epoch. Analysis: Need to submit eval to get test baseline, then train longer with improvements. Key bottleneck is Africa (underrepresented in training data). The extreme region weights (22x for Africa) may cause instability. Decision: Submit eval with current best checkpoint to measure test performance, then in next iteration train longer with capped region weights and potentially mixup.
